title: dupatya freyreissii
intro: Dupatya freyreissii, also known as the "Mountain Pepper Tree", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the Philippines and Indonesia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dupatya freyreissii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, which are believed to provide relief from various health issues.
